name: Tighter Aim
description: Same drill, smaller target. 7 notes, ±15 cents tolerance. You've got the basics — time to sharpen up.

feedback.intro: The target zone is smaller now. Listen carefully, breathe, then place your voice right in the center.
feedback.tooFlat: Nudge it up just a hair.
feedback.tip: Accuracy improves fastest when you slow down. Give your brain time to hear the target before you sing.
